toluca-v0.1.0.description:
Initial version for my Donkey Kong Country 3 Archipelago Randomizer.
# Info
* There's no web page yet, I'm tired boss
* Requires US version of the game, same as DKC3 AP implementation.
  * US HASH: `120abf304f0c40fe059f6a192ed4f947`
toluca-v0.1.0.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v0.1.0

toluca-v0.1.1.description:
A few quick-ish changes

# Changes
* Added an item that reveals the position of any collectible with a fast spinning banana on their position (Banana Radar)
* Fixed Boss Battles still having a DK Barrel at the start when only having one Kong unlocked
* Potentially fixed logic for entering boss battles
* Fixed Stampede Sprint having wrong bonus offsets
* Some logic updates & fixes
toluca-v0.1.1.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v0.1.1

toluca-v0.2.0.description:
A bunch of new shiny stuff plus a lot of adjustments which should have been there since the initial release (couldn't miss that April Fools release xd)
# Changes
* Implemented level shuffle
* Enhanced the save/load procedure in both client and ROM
    * Fixes missing items that are received before opening a save
    * Fixes banana radar being unlocked from the start
* Extra hit indicator is now shown on boss battles and bonuses
* Extra hit now works with lightnings, Bleak and Toboggan
* Backup DK Barrels now require pressing `SELECT` when converted or riding an animal
* Added a new option that allows you to pre-set a new default save file name
* Made it so excluded level clears have no logical weight to unlock world bosses
    * You can still clear those levels to access the boss out of logic
* Kong-fused Cliffs no longer ignores not having Climb
* Fixed Carry being given upon exiting a Bonus that had an invisible collectible nearby and the radar was active
* Fixed some visual glitches related to locked items not properly despawning certain sprites
* Added a missing banana bunch in Buzzer Barrage
* Swapped Stampede Sprint bonuses
* Added collect support
* Updated a few area names
* Several logic changes
toluca-v0.2.0.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v0.2.0

toluca-v0.2.2.description: Makes tests happier and allows loading on custom webhosts. Also now works on Python 3.11 if that's relevant for anyone (lol)
toluca-v0.2.2.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v0.2.2
